title: Isolation of bacterial DNA with Gentra Puregene kit (modified protocol)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"l05p","text":"The Qiagen protocol for purification of genomic DNA from gram-positive bacterial cultures using Yeast/Bact. Kit ( Gentra Puregene Handbook - QIAGEN) was modified to aid in the isolation of bacterial DNA from heterogeneous, low volume, low OD  cultures","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":114,"length":33}],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"037AC51DD7B911EDB9470A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!\u0026\u0026p=2d8e1f317326debdJmltdHM9MTY4MTA4NDgwMCZpZ3VpZD0yMTdjZDI2NS0wMzhlLTY1MDgtMWU4MS1jM2FmMDIyNDY0OWQmaW5zaWQ9NTE5NQ\u0026ptn=3\u0026hsh=3\u0026fclid=217cd265-038e-6508-1e81-c3af0224649d\u0026psq=gentra+puregene+kit+qiagen+handbook\u0026u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucWlhZ2VuLmNvbS9jYS9-L21lZGlhLzVBREY1QzM4RUQ4NzQ5RTFCQTRDNDk2NkEyMTVBODNCLmFzaHg\u0026ntb=1"}}}}
steps: centrifuge for 10min at 12000rpm to pellet cells
add 1 ml sterile PBS to pellet and vortex briefly to resuspend cells
add 310ul lysis solution (Qiagen #158113) to each tube. Pipette up and down gently to resuspend cells
add 1.2ul of 10mg/ml RNase A per tube
invert tube gently several times to mix
centrifuge at 12000rpm for 3 minutes. (The precipitated protein should form a tight pellet).
transfer supernatant to a fresh sterile tube (by pipette)
add 1-2ul of glycogen (20mg/ml) (Thermofisher #R0561) to the supernatant and mix it by pipetting up and down
invert tube gently 50 times to mix (optionally: incubate at RT for 30 min to improve DNA yield)
carefully decant off isopropanol (the pellet might be loose)
add 500ul of 70% ethanol (cold), and invert tube a few times to wash the DNA pellet
pour off ethanol carefully – pellet may be loose
heat samples to 80ºC for 5-10 minutes to complete the lysis **stop step: lysed cells are stable at room temperature
rehydrate DNA in ~35-50ul of 10mM Tris buffer (pH7.5-8.0) (adjust for large or smaller pellet)
creator: o.pogoutse
